findings.summary: Required: the rejected simplified packet specified one forbidden runtime or HCM-0.5 scope fixture rather than requiring two distinct negative fixtures. The finding is intentionally not remediated because terminal Review 2 exhausted the authorized budget and triggered abandonment.

blockers.summary: HCM-0.9 is abandoned and has no execution authority.

chat_summary: HCM-0.9 is abandoned. The simplified eight-leaf plan received two fresh reviews and one remediation; terminal Redesign Review 2 remained not CLEAN with one Required scope-negative defect. No Review 3 ran. Exact rejected evidence is preserved at f3a33ddb55443d37f3a51ffb58f1c85b74a28b23, abandonment control is committed at 786744e727c3db3a1bf685b50316754f09aadb30, the monolithic 05 remains canonical, and no HCM-0.9 execution or HCM-0.5 start is authorized.
